message:
fix: prevent set -e from aborting script on Patch 7 node failure

The Patch 7 node command (gmi wrapper PATH reorder) ran as a standalone
statement before a $? check. With set -euo pipefail, a non-zero exit
from node would kill the script before the $? check could run. Fixed by
moving the node command into `if ... ; then` so the conditional
suppresses set -e.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
